title: Animal Pens Paperized Resource Pack
description: Animal Pens Paperized Resource Pack for clients
body:
# 🐾 Animal Pens Paperized Resource Pack

This resource pack is for [Animal Pens Paperized](https://modrinth.com/plugin/animalpenspaperized) plugin. 

It adds custom textures to:
- Animal Cage
- Water Mob Container
- Animal Pens 
- Aquarium

Ability to customise locale for clients.
